posts.title: Biophilic Design on a Budget: Artificial Plants in Corporate Offices
posts.description: The research is clear – nature in the workplace improves focus, reduces stress, and lowers absenteeism. Here's how to achieve biophilic design without live plant maintenance costs.

posts.description: Not all artificial plants are suitable for outdoor use. This guide explains UV ratings, expected lifespan, and what to look for when specifying outdoor commercial installations.
